description: TAM pgd_delta sweep: pgd_delta=3.0, pgd_step_size=1.0 (delta/mining_opt_steps). All else fixed: anchor_step=2, mining_opt_steps=3, gc_loss. Very large PGD radius: aggressive mining, 2x q220 delta. Expects largest neg_dist or possible divergence. May overfit on hard negatives or learning becomes unstable. SUCCESS: val_mse < 0.00975 and anchor_dist in (0.2, 5.0).
notes: TAM pgd_delta=3.0 variant. Very large PGD radius: 2x q220 delta. Aggressive mining with large step size (1.0). May improve robustness via hard negatives or risk training instability. Key diagnostic: neg_dist should be ~3.0 from x_pos. If mse diverges, reduce delta.
